title: ShaSins Better leaves
description: A texture pack aiming to improve the minecraft leaves by adding Bushy textures.
body:
![Better Leaves.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/722be8a07787c40d958b128b2c6731f8f7cbe6bf.png)
# Better Leaves: #
Better Leaves is a texture pack that aims to add some Bushy leaves to Minecraft to add more variety , aesthetics and give a jungle look.
